story: Deep Diver once hauled out on a single long coast; centuries later those shores were a scatter of islands. Aboard the wooden sailing ship Destiny’s Dreams, Anya—the Storyteller of the Blue Lantern—wrote as the ship slipped past sunlit coves. Elephant seals roared from a crowded beach. Beyond the next headland, a sudden squall was spreading like a dark fan across the sea, noticed by a kelp fisher far offshore but still hidden behind the cliffs. Anya finished a paragraph, capped her pen, and listened to the surf and the animals while the crew kept an easy course.
implausible_knowledge: Beyond the next headland, a sudden squall was spreading like a dark fan across the sea, noticed by a kelp fisher far offshore but still hidden behind the cliffs.
question: After finishing her journal entry, what will Anya instruct the crew to do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Reef the sails at once and steer for sheltered water behind the headland to ride out the squall.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep close to the islands and continue sailing slowly to watch and listen to the rookeries.
